ideal_must_detect.matched_text: In the same folder, draft materials for “Project Banyan” (proposed acquisition of CoralStack Ltd.) included a term sheet and internal valuation ranges.
For PDPA purposes, our DPO is Ms. Priya Nair (dpo@harbourquay.com; tel +65 6 223 4455), and breach notifications will be made within the statutory window.

Exposed records include direct identifiers: mobile +65 8123 4567, work email aaron.lim@harbourquay.com, and SG passport E1234567Z for Mr. Aaron Lim.
The dataset also listed Civic Bank (SG) payroll account 003-987654-1 and an employee address at 12 Meranti Crescent #08-02, Singapore 567890.
A scanned onboarding form shows “NRIC: S 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 A”, which appears to be an invalid checksum entry carried over from a legacy template

must_detect.matched_text: In the same folder, draft materials for “Project Banyan” (proposed acquisition of CoralStack Ltd.) included a term sheet and internal valuation ranges.
For PDPA purposes, our DPO is Ms. Priya Nair (dpo@harbourquay.com; tel +65 6 223 4455), and breach notifications will be made within the statutory window.

201912345A), Mainboard issuer on Lion City Exchange
On 30 May 2026 14:20 SGT, a misconfiguration by ByteCrane Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202045678B) exposed a cloud bucket used by our HR and deal room (CloudVault Pro).
Exposed records include direct identifiers: mobile +65 8123 4567, work email aaron.lim@harbourquay.com, and SG passport E1234567Z for Mr. Aaron Lim.
The dataset also listed Civic Bank (SG) payroll account 003-987654-1 and an employee address at 12 Meranti Crescent #08-02, Singapore 567890.
A scanned onboarding form shows “NRIC: S 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 A”, which appears to be an invalid checksum entry carried over from a legacy template.
In the same folder, draft materials for “Project Banyan” (proposed acquisition of CoralStack Ltd.) included a term sheet and internal valuation ranges.
As these deal documents are not generally available and could affect price discovery, they may constitute MNPI under the Lion City Securities and Futures Act and LCE Listing Manual.
At this stage we do not expect a material adverse change to the group’s financial position; nevertheless we are assessing whether a trading halt or immediate announcement is warranted.
For PDPA purposes, our DPO is Ms. Priya Nair (dpo@harbourquay.com; tel +65 6 223 4455), and breach notifications will be made within the statutory window.
The vendor’s public helpline 1800 123 4567 appears in their notice and is a general contact number, not an affected individual’s phone.
Some identifiers are obfuscated or OCR-degraded, e.g., UEN: 2 0 1 9 1 2 3 4 5 A and email “aar on.l im@ harb ourqu ay.com”; see also https://portal.lcex-main.com/issuer/announce?uen=201912345A
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Incident Report — Harbour Quay Holdings Ltd. (UEN: 201912345A), Mainboard issuer on Lion City Exchange
On 30 May 2026 14:20 SGT, a misconfiguration by ByteCrane Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202045678B) exposed a cloud bucket used by our HR and deal room (CloudVault Pro).
Exposed records include direct identifiers: mobile +65 8123 4567, work email aaron.lim@harbourquay.com, and SG passport E1234567Z for Mr. Aaron Lim.
The dataset also listed Civic Bank (SG) payroll account 003-987654-1 and an employee address at 12 Meranti Crescent #08-02, Singapore 567890.
A scanned onboarding form shows “NRIC: S 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 A”, which appears to be an invalid checksum entry carried over from a legacy template.
In the same folder, draft materials for “Project Banyan” (proposed acquisition of CoralStack Ltd.) included a term sheet and internal valuation ranges.
As these deal documents are not generally available and could affect price discovery, they may constitute MNPI under the Lion City Securities and Futures Act and LCE Listing Manual.
At this stage we do not expect a material adverse change to the group’s financial position; nevertheless we are assessing whether a trading halt or immediate announcement is warranted.
For PDPA purposes, our DPO is Ms. Priya Nair (dpo@harbourquay.com; tel +65 6 223 4455), and breach notifications will be made within the statutory window.
